args.query: Target return policy most items 90 days unopened Target Plus sold shipped by Target

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: What''s the return policy?

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  TARGET''S RETURN POLICY


  Target may deny a return, refund, or exchange when it identifies fraud, suspected
  fraud, abuse, or another reason allowed under its policy.


  For the standard policy, most unopened items sold by Target may be returned in new
  condition within 90 days for a refund or exchange. The applicable period for an
  item purchased on Target.com does not begin when the order is placed or when it
  ships. It begins when the customer receives the item.


  For an online order, receipt of the item occurs when one of the following fulfillment
  events is completed:


  1. The shipment is delivered to the customer.

  2. A Shipt shopper completes delivery.

  3. The customer completes an in-store pickup.


  Some products do not use the standard period. A modified policy may be shown on
  the receipt, packing slip, Target''s posted refund-exception information, the Target.com
  product page, or the individual item description. Opened or damaged merchandise,
  and merchandise without an eligible receipt, may be denied a refund or exchange.


  TARGET PLUS PARTNER ITEMS


  Most unopened items sold by a Target Plus Partner in new condition generally use
  a 30-day return period. For Target.com orders, the period likewise begins when the
  item is received through delivery, Shipt delivery, or store pickup. Partner items
  must be returned through Target, either in a store or by mail. Some partner products
  may have a different period listed on their product page.


  Customers should review the return-exceptions information when an item has a product-specific
  policy. The separate online-return instructions explain how to start a return after
  the item has been determined to comply with the applicable return policy.

  '
metadata: {}
title: What's the return policy?
url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980

Order **TGT-742091** was delivered on **April 10, 2026** and was sold and shipped by Target. Target’s standard policy allows most **unopened items sold by Target** to be returned in new condition within **90 days of delivery**. That period would have ended around **July 9, 2026**.

The return review time for this order is **July 11, 2026 at 12:00 PM Pacific**, so it appears to be **outside the normal return period**. The fact that it is unopened is favorable, but it does not extend the deadline.

What to do:

1. Open Target’s **Orders** section and select order **TGT-742091**.
2. Choose **Return or replace item** and select the reason.
3. If the return option is unavailable, contact Target Guest Services and ask whether they can approve a **late return exception**. Keep the spatula set unopened and in its original packaging.
4. Don’t ship it until Target provides return instructions or a label.

Target’s policy: [What’s the return policy?](https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980)

final_answer:
Order **TGT-742091** was delivered on **April 10, 2026** and was sold and shipped by Target. Target’s standard policy allows most **unopened items sold by Target** to be returned in new condition within **90 days of delivery**. That period would have ended around **July 9, 2026**.

The return review time for this order is **July 11, 2026 at 12:00 PM Pacific**, so it appears to be **outside the normal return period**. The fact that it is unopened is favorable, but it does not extend the deadline.

What to do:

1. Open Target’s **Orders** section and select order **TGT-742091**.
2. Choose **Return or replace item** and select the reason.
3. If the return option is unavailable, contact Target Guest Services and ask whether they can approve a **late return exception**. Keep the spatula set unopened and in its original packaging.
4. Don’t ship it until Target provides return instructions or a label.

Target’s policy: [What’s the return policy?](https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980)
